scripts.start: ng build circle-of-fifths-lib && ng serve circle-of-fifths
scripts.build: ng build circle-of-fifths-lib && ng build circle-of-fifths
scripts.build:gh-pages: ng build circle-of-fifths-lib && ng build circle-of-fifths --base-href /circle-of-fifths/
scripts.watch: ng build circle-of-fifths-lib && ng build circle-of-fifths --watch --configuration development
